site_name.title: Site Display Name
site_name.description: Shown in admin headers, page titles, and system emails.

allow_login.title: Allow Login
allow_login.description: When disabled, public sign-in is unavailable and login routes return a notice.

allow_signup.title: Allow Signup
allow_signup.description: When disabled, public account registration is unavailable.

allow_mfa_totp.title: Allow MFA (TOTP)
allow_mfa_totp.description: When enabled, users can enroll an authenticator app and must complete MFA at sign-in when enrolled.

allow_passkeys.title: Allow Passkeys
allow_passkeys.description: When enabled, users can register passkeys for second-factor or passwordless sign-in.

captcha_enabled.title: Enable Captcha
captcha_enabled.description: When enabled, Cannon expands <captcha> placeholders using the active captcha extension.

captcha_active_extension.title: Active Captcha Extension
captcha_active_extension.description: Extension name that handles <captcha provider="any"> placeholders. Ignored when captcha is disabled.

captcha_skip_authenticated.title: Skip Captcha For Signed-In Users
captcha_skip_authenticated.description: When enabled, authenticated users do not see captcha widgets and verification is not required on submit.

site_offline.title: Site Offline
site_offline.description: When enabled, public routes show a maintenance page. Admin remains available.

maintenance_mode.title: Maintenance Mode (legacy)
maintenance_mode.description: Alias for Site Offline when site_offline is unset.

default_list_limit.title: Default List Limit
default_list_limit.description: Rows per page in admin table views.

log_level.title: Log Level
log_level.description: Minimum severity written to the Cannon process log.

memory_cache_enabled.title: Enable In-Memory Data Cache
memory_cache_enabled.description: Cache frequently read site data (settings, routes, blocks, groups) in process memory. Disable for debugging or when running multiple Cannon processes against one database.

debug_template_spaces.title: Debug Template Spaces
debug_template_spaces.description: When enabled, append ?tp=1 to a public URL to outline each {{space "…"}} region with a labeled border.

frontend_theme.title: Frontend Theme
frontend_theme.description: Template pack used for the public site. Built-in default uses embedded templates; custom themes live as folders under the site template directory.

admin_theme.title: Admin Theme
admin_theme.description: Template pack used for the admin UI. Built-in admin uses embedded templates; custom themes live as folders under the site template directory.

content_multilingual.title: Multilingual Content
content_multilingual.description: When enabled, items and categories are scoped by locale and public URLs may use a /{locale} prefix.

content_default_locale.title: Default Content Locale
content_default_locale.description: Locale used for content without an explicit locale prefix in the URL.

content_locales.title: Content Locales
content_locales.description: Locales available for content. Falls back to installed language files when empty.
